confirmations.reason: Auto mode explicitly enables autonomous execution where the agent runs continuously without step-by-step human approval, which directly maps to looping until a done condition is met. Background safety checks are the guardrails on that loop, not a distraction from it.
Session resume directly and specifically allows continuing a previous session, which is the core of this capability. No ambiguity here.

Remote Control is about remotely accessing/monitoring a *locally running* Claude Code session from another device (phone, tablet, browser). This is inter-device session bridging/continuity, not a definition of where the agent can natively operate (terminal, IDE, web, cloud, mobile as first-class surfaces). It is closer to a remote-access or session-continuity feature than a declaration of supported access surfaces.
